commit.subject: LU-13137 debug: exec binary while clear locks
commit.message:
LU-13137 debug: exec binary while clear locks

execute binary from Lustre directory and clear locks.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity envdefinitions=ONLY=30d
Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity envdefinitions=ONLY=30d
Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity envdefinitions=ONLY=30d
Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Id57cf311f6cea9f1fec73891cfcd26aadd886dc4
